parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: $json.name, email: $json.email, phone: $json.phone || "", custom_attributes: { last_quote_device: ($json.deviceType || "") + ($json.deviceModel ? " - " + $json.deviceModel : ""), last_quote_fault: $json.faultArea || "", last_quote_issue: $json.issue || "", last_quote_repair: $json.repairTitle || "", last_quote_price: $json.totalPrice || "", last_quote_route: $json.route || "", last_quote_date: new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0] } }) }}

parameters.subject: =Quote Request: {{ $json.name }} - {{ $json.deviceModel || $json.deviceType || 'Repair' }}
